title: Jiggs and Maggie Out West
writer: George McManus, Barney Gerard, Adele Buffington
actors: Joe Yule, Renie Riano, George McManus
plot: The family heads to the Wild West when Maggie's grandfather passes away and leaves her his gold mine, near the town of Gower Gulch. When they get to town, however, they discover that they don't know quite where grandpa's gold is (...
